WITH


source_data AS (
    SELECT

    
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        vorname,
        name,
        geschlecht,
        geburtsdatum,
        telefon,
        mobil,
        email,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        ldts

  FROM "postgres"."dv"."base_roadshow_kunde"

  ),





ldts_rsrc_data AS (

  SELECT
    CAST( ldts as TIMESTAMPTZ ) AS ldts,
    CAST( 'ROADSHOW' as VARCHAR ) AS rsrc,
      
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        vorname,
        name,
        geschlecht,
        geburtsdatum,
        telefon,
        mobil,
        email,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma
    

  FROM source_data),




hashed_columns AS (

    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        vorname,
        name,
        geschlecht,
        geburtsdatum,
        telefon,
        mobil,
        email,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(kundeid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_kunde_h,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(vereinspartnerid AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(vorname AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(name AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(geschlecht AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(geburtsdatum AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(telefon AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(mobil AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(email AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(kreditkarte AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(gueltigbis AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(kkfirma AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hd_kunde_s

    FROM ldts_rsrc_data
  
),

unknown_values AS (

    SELECT

    CAST(TO_TIMESTAMP('0001-01-01 00:00:01', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TIMESTAMPTZ) as ldts
    ,'SYSTEM' as rsrc
        , '(unknown)' as kundeid
        , '(unknown)' as vereinspartnerid
        , '(unknown)' as vorname
        , '(unknown)' as name
        , '(unknown)' as geschlecht
        ,TO_DATE('0001-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as geburtsdatum
        , '(unknown)' as telefon
        , '(unknown)' as mobil
        , '(unknown)' as email
        , '(unknown)' as kreditkarte
        , '(unknown)' as gueltigbis
        , '(unknown)' as kkfirma
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_kunde_h
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hd_kunde_s
),


error_values AS (

    SELECT

    CAST(TO_TIMESTAMP('8888-12-31 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TIMESTAMPTZ) as ldts
    ,'ERROR' as rsrc
        , '(error)' as kundeid
        , '(error)' as vereinspartnerid
        , '(error)' as vorname
        , '(error)' as name
        , '(error)' as geschlecht
        ,TO_DATE('8888-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as geburtsdatum
        , '(error)' as telefon
        , '(error)' as mobil
        , '(error)' as email
        , '(error)' as kreditkarte
        , '(error)' as gueltigbis
        , '(error)' as kkfirma
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_kunde_h
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hd_kunde_s
),


ghost_records AS (
    SELECT * FROM unknown_values
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM error_values
),
columns_to_select AS (

    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        vorname,
        name,
        geschlecht,
        geburtsdatum,
        telefon,
        mobil,
        email,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        hk_kunde_h,
        hd_kunde_s

    FROM hashed_columns
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        vorname,
        name,
        geschlecht,
        geburtsdatum,
        telefon,
        mobil,
        email,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        hk_kunde_h,
        hd_kunde_s

    FROM ghost_records

)

SELECT * FROM columns_to_select
